assertions.description: The analyzer correctly identifies that ~{SD_MODE}, BCLK, LRCLK, and DOUT signals cross between the 3.3V domain (ESP32-WROVER-B U6) and the 5V domain (MAX98357A audio amplifier U2), flagging all four with needs_level_shifter: true. The MAX98357A datasheet confirms it is a 5V part with I2S inputs accepting 3.3V logic, so whether a level shifter is strictly needed depends on the I2S input threshold, but the cross-domain detection itself is accurate.

The schematic contains a MAX3232 RS-232 transceiver (U5) with RXD0/TXD0 signals connecting to the ESP32-WROVER-B (U6), and a dedicated UART debug connector (J4) labeled 'UART'. Despite the debug connector being found in test_coverage.debug_connectors, signal_paths.bus_analysis.uart is empty. The analyzer should detect the UART bus formed by the MAX3232 and ESP32.
